RO1_eating_moments.label: Eating moments and contexts
RO1_eating_moments.description: What is the full spectrum of student eating moments and how does delivery fit within them?

RO1_eating_moments.when_where_and_how_do.label: When, where, and how do students eat across a typical week?

RO1_eating_moments.what_role_does_cookin.label: What role does cooking, campus food, and delivery each play?

RO1_eating_moments.how_does_accommodatio.label: How does accommodation type shape eating routines?

RO1_eating_moments.what_are_the_distinct.label: What are the distinct eating occasions (solo study, group social, hangover, celebration)?

RO2_delivery_triggers.label: Delivery triggers and drivers
RO2_delivery_triggers.description: What triggers a student to order food delivery rather than cook, eat out, or eat campus food?

RO2_delivery_triggers.what_are_the_prima.label: What are the primary triggers (time, social, emotional, situational)?

RO2_delivery_triggers.what_barriers_prev.label: What barriers prevent ordering (cost, guilt, availability)?

RO2_delivery_triggers.how_does_the_decis.label: How does the decision process work from trigger to order?

RO2_delivery_triggers.what_role_do_promo.label: What role do promotions, deals, and subscriptions play?

RO3_emotional_social.label: Emotional and social factors
RO3_emotional_social.description: What emotional and social dynamics shape food delivery behaviour?

RO3_emotional_social.how_does_social_con.label: How does social context (alone vs group) change ordering?

RO3_emotional_social.what_emotions_are_a.label: What emotions are associated with ordering (treat, guilt, comfort)?

RO3_emotional_social.how_do_flatmates_fr.label: How do flatmates, friends, and partners influence decisions?

RO3_emotional_social.is_there_stigma_aro.label: Is there stigma around solo ordering or frequent ordering?

RO4_post_graduation.label: Post-graduation evolution
RO4_post_graduation.description: How do food and delivery habits change as students transition to graduates?

RO4_post_graduation.what_habits_persist_.label: What habits persist, intensify, or fade after graduation?

RO4_post_graduation.how_do_changing_fina.label: How do changing finances and living situations affect ordering?

RO4_post_graduation.does_the_value_equat.label: Does the value equation for delivery shift post-graduation?

RO4_post_graduation.what_drives_continue.label: What drives continued or lapsed platform engagement?

RO5_engagement_opps.label: Engagement opportunities
RO5_engagement_opps.description: Where are the highest-value opportunities for Deliveroo to engage students?

RO5_engagement_opps.which_moments_are_mo.label: Which moments are most receptive to delivery (unmet needs)?

RO5_engagement_opps.what_product_feature.label: What product features would increase relevance?

RO5_engagement_opps.how_should_messaging.label: How should messaging evolve across the student lifecycle?

RO5_engagement_opps.what_role_can_plus_s.label: What role can Plus Silver play in acquisition and retention?

brand_perception_gap.label: Brand Perception Gap
brand_perception_gap.description: Delivery platform branding fails to communicate its function to non-users

treat_guilt_tension.label: Treat-Guilt Tension
treat_guilt_tension.description: Delivery is simultaneously desired as a treat and rejected as indulgent

social_permission.label: Social Permission Effect
social_permission.description: Ordering with others removes guilt and reframes delivery as social

subscription_spending_fear.label: Subscription Spending Fear
subscription_spending_fear.description: Students fear subscriptions will increase total spending

multi_platform_arbitrage.label: Multi-Platform Arbitrage
multi_platform_arbitrage.description: Students compare prices across platforms before every order

switching_threshold_gap.label: Switching Threshold Say-Do Gap
switching_threshold_gap.description: Reported loyalty is stronger than observed behaviour

subscriber_payer_role.label: Subscriber-Payer Social Role
subscriber_payer_role.description: Subscriber becomes designated payer in group orders, reinforcing retention

academic_pressure_ordering.label: Academic Pressure as Ordering Accelerator
academic_pressure_ordering.description: Final year schedule pressure directly increases ordering frequency
